expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS docs stay aligned
expectations.evidence: The run explicitly notes the intended focus, but cannot actually cover/verify AGENTS alignment because AGENTS docs are missing from evidence: execution_notes.md: "AGENTS docs not present in provided evidence, so alignment with AGENTS documentation cannot be verified" and result.md: "AGENTS docs (not present in provided evidence)" / "Status: cannot be verified from provided evidence." Therefore the case focus (including AGENTS docs) is not fully covered.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase docs
expectations.evidence: result.md’s conclusions are consistent with the primary docs-phase artifacts it had (SKILL.md/README.md/reference.md): it reports "Status: aligned" for SKILL.md ↔ reference.md and "Status: aligned" for README.md ↔ SKILL.md/reference.md, while correctly qualifying limits: "reference.md is truncated" and "AGENTS alignment is unassessable." The output does not claim unsupported alignment beyond the evidence.
